full_text:
Xu Huang (Gongming) 徐晃 (公明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Huang (徐晃), styledGongming (公明), was born in Yang County, He Dong Commandery (Presently Hong Dong County in Shan Xi Province). Served Cao Cao. Famous for breaking the siege of Fancheng against Guan Yu. Xu Huang was affiliated with Yang Feng, the Han Dynasty, and the Wei Kingdom. Xu Huang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
